_instructions: Registered via POST /api/companies/a5fa2ad1-fb06-4a1c-a690-436bec394e85/agents on 2026-03-31. Agent ID: 382baeff-c2b0-4ef8-a834-854f61864105. Reports to tax-vat-manager (578d2fdf-8df4-4b13-a8de-dce511c6c0c8).
name: vat-compliance-manager
title: VAT Compliance Manager
capabilities: Manages the quarterly VAT return cycle across all Carisma entities on Malta's staggered schedule: Dec/Jan/Feb accounts to CLA (send end March, file April), Jun/Jul/Aug accounts to CSA (send end Sept, file Oct), Sep/Oct/Nov accounts to CSA (send end Dec, file Jan). Tracks CFR reference numbers, maintains a 3-year rolling compliance history, and ensures accounts packs reach accountants at least 7 days before deadline.
